title: KeyPackageResponse{data:None} silently ignored — new member never added, no feedback
description: The match arm handling KeyPackageResponse only matches data:Some(kp_data). If the relay returns data:None (key package not yet stored, or stored but expired/deleted), the None case falls through to ClientEvent::Message(other)=>info!(...). The admin asked for a KP, got nothing, and gives no indication to the user. The new member waits indefinitely to be added. Fix: add an explicit None arm that logs a warn and optionally retries after a short delay.
